stemHtml: Within the human sensory system, habituation can create operational risks. Which of the following situations illustrates a danger that may result from habituation?

options.a: Reduced sensitivity to red light during sunrise or sunset, possibly leading to missing a red warning indication.
options.b: Temporary blindness after exposure to a bright flash of light.
options.c: Loss of balance during prolonged coordinated flight.
options.d: Reduced visual acuity at night due to decreased cone activity.
